jcr:content.jcr:description: Meet the people powering AbbVie science. Explore our scientists, leaders, and R&D community.
jcr:content.jcr:title: Our People

block_2.name: Custom Title
block_2.title: Shaping the future of science, together

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: This is a place for the bold and the brilliant to build dynamic careers. A place to co-create breakthroughs and sharpen each other’s ideas. With deep expertise and long-time leadership in our fields, we look to raise the bar, then redefine it.

block.name: Brightcove Video
block.overlayHeading: Behind the Science with Evan Jian He

block.name: Custom Title
block.title: Curiosity and collaboration at our core

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Meet the scientists turning curiosity into medicines, working together across disciplines and pushing through challenges that aim to deliver breakthroughs that can change lives. See how Evan’s work in Operations is fueled by rigor and resolve to turn small insights into big breakthroughs.

block.captionDescription: Caro in Medical Affairs + Health Impact, Immunology explains how bold strategy, cross-functional collaboration and relentless focus on patients help shape AbbVie’s approach to scientific innovation.
block.captionHeading: Caro Park on the Culture of Pushing Boundaries
block.name: Brightcove Video

block.captionDescription: Jorge in Medical Affairs + Health Impact, Neuroscience reflects on the importance of failure – and persistence – in advancing discovery.
block.captionHeading: Jorge Zamudio on Pursuing Challenging Science for Patients
block.name: Brightcove Video

block.captionDescription: In-Ho in Clinical Development, Immunology shares how staying true to purpose and leading with curiosity helps transform challenges into opportunities for progress.
block.captionHeading: In-Ho Song on Shaping the Future of Medicine
block.name: Brightcove Video

block.captionDescription: Kim in Clinical Development Operations explains how a problem solving mindset helps tackle challenges and deliver new medicines.
block.name: Brightcove Video

block.attributionRole: Executive Vice President, Research & Development, Chief Scientific Officer, AbbVie
block.name: Quote
block.quotation: We can achieve more for patients when we are agile, bold and co-create the best solutions possible. When we do, we all win – because patients benefit.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Discover our innovators and leaders. The bold and curious, who take on the toughest scientific challenges with proven expertise and an unmatched drive to expand what’s possible in science.

block.name: Video
block.overlayDescription: Hear from scientists about what it takes to make a breakthrough.
block.overlayHeading: The eureka moment behind a scientific discovery

item_0.name: Accordion Item
item_0.summary: What's it like to work for AbbVie R&D?
item_0.text: See our community. Working in AbbVie R&D means being part of a global community where science is sleeves-rolled-up and purpose-driven. Our culture encourages bold ideas, collaboration across disciplines and the persistence it takes to turn discovery into impact for patients.

item_1.name: Accordion Item
item_1.summary: Who is on the R&D leadership team?
item_1.text: Meet our R&D leaders. AbbVie's R&D leaders combine deep scientific and medical expertise with vision and resolve. They set the course for our pipeline and guide teams that develop new medicines for patients worldwide.

item_2.name: Accordion Item
item_2.summary: What research publications have AbbVie scientists contributed to?
item_2.text: Explore AbbVie’s research publications. Our science is recognized across the global research community through peer-reviewed publications, collaborations and presentations at leading scientific forums.

item_3.name: Accordion Item
item_3.summary: How many scientists work at AbbVie?
item_3.text:
Thousands of AbbVie scientists worldwide contribute their expertise across the discovery, development, and delivery of medicines. Together, they form a diverse and dynamic team across R&D and operations.
Discover more key facts

item_4.name: Accordion Item
item_4.text: See our global R&D locations. AbbVie's R&D network spans the globe, with major sites in the United States, Europe and Japan. These locations create an environment where collaboration thrives and innovation accelerates.

block.name: Custom Title
block.title: Bring your potential to where science meets purpose
